title: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
summary: Valve announced that its long-delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset will launch in summer 2026, pushing back from the original early 2026 timeline due to memory and storage supply constraints. The company detailed verified programs for both devices ahead of the launch.
content:
Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. In a Thursday blog post detailing its Verified programs for both pieces of hardware, Valve concludes by saying that "We're excited for players to try your titles on the new Steam hardware once they launch this summer."
When the company originally announced the Machine and Frame alongside its new Steam Controller late last year, it said that it would start shipping the new gadgets in early 2026. But in February, the company announced that the ongoing memory and storage crunch had forced it to revisit its pricing and shipping pl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve表示准备在今年夏天推出Steam Machine
zh.summary: Valve宣布其久违的Steam Machine PC和Steam Frame VR头显将在2026年夏季推出，由于内存和存储供应限制，从原定的2026年初推迟。该公司详细说明了两款设备在推出前的验证计划。

title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
summary: Anthropic reported annualized revenue of $47 billion in May 2026, a dramatic increase from $9 billion at the end of 2025, demonstrating significant growth ahead of the company's anticipated IPO. The company faces scrutiny over whether its investments will deliver sustainable returns.
content: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

zh.title: 在IPO之前，Anthropic的Daniela Amodei对AI回报的质疑不屑一顾
zh.summary: Anthropic报告称2026年5月年化收入为470亿美元，相比2025年底的90亿美元大幅增长，在公司预期IPO之前展现了显著增长。该公司面临其投资是否能带来可持续回报的审视。

title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
summary: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky announced plans to launch an AI lab, reversing the company's previous reluctance to partner with existing large language models. Chesky cited that current LLM products had not yet reached the maturity needed for Airbnb's needs.
content: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

zh.title: Airbnb的Brian Chesky计划推出新的AI实验室
zh.summary: Airbnb首席执行官Brian Chesky宣布计划启动一个AI实验室，扭转了公司之前对与现有大型语言模型合作的犹豫态度。Chesky表示，当前的LLM产品尚未达到Airbnb所需的成熟度。

title: The skeptic’s guide to humanoid robots going viral on the Internet
summary: A new analysis examines how viral demonstrations of humanoid robots can distort public understanding of their actual capabilities and limitations. The piece highlights the gap between marketing claims and real-world robotic performance.
content: Robot demonstrations can distort public perceptions of robotic capabilities.

zh.title: 人形机器人在互联网上走红的怀疑者指南
zh.summary: 一项新分析探讨了人形机器人的病毒式演示如何会曲解公众对其实际能力和局限性的理解。该文章强调了营销宣传与现实机器人性能之间的差距。

title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app
summary: Filtr, an ad-blocking app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs, gained new functionality to block ads within native applications thanks to updated Apple software features. The privacy tool now extends ad blocking beyond web browsers to app-level coverage.
content: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.

zh.title: Filtr是一款在几乎所有iPhone和Mac应用中阻止广告的新隐私工具
zh.summary: 得益于苹果软件功能的更新，iPhone、iPad和Mac的广告拦截应用Filtr获得了在本机应用中阻止广告的新功能。该隐私工具现在将广告拦截从网络浏览器扩展到应用级别的覆盖。

title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18
summary: StrictlyVC Los Angeles will convene investors, founders, and technology leaders on June 18 at The Aerospace Corporation Campus to discuss defense technology, artificial intelligence, and venture capital trends. The event explores major shifts in these emerging sectors.
content: On Thursday, June 18, at The Aerospace Corporation Campus, investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather for an evening of conversation exploring some of the most consequential shifts taking place across venture capital, defense technology, artificial intelligence, and advanced industry. Secure your spot today.

zh.title: 国防技术、人工智能和融资成为6月18日StrictlyVC洛杉矶活动的焦点
zh.summary: StrictlyVC洛杉矶将于6月18日在航空航天公司园区召集投资者、创始人和技术领导者，讨论国防技术、人工智能和风险资本趋势。该活动探讨了这些新兴领域的重大转变。

title: AT&T and Verizon lose Supreme Court case over fines for selling location data
summary: The Supreme Court ruled 8-1 that AT&T and Verizon did not have a constitutional right to jury trial in the FCC's enforcement action regarding location data sales. The decision upholds the regulatory agency's authority to fine carriers for privacy violations.
content: FCC did not violate carriers' right to jury trial, court says in 8-1 ruling.

zh.title: AT&T和威瑞森在位置数据销售罚款的最高法院案件中败诉
zh.summary: 最高法院以8比1的裁定认定，AT&T和威瑞森在美国联邦通信委员会关于位置数据销售的执法行动中，没有宪法赋予的陪审团审判权。该决定维持了监管机构对运营商隐私违规行为进行罚款的权限。

title: Startup Battlefield is returning to Australia — here’s what happened the last time we came to Sydney
summary: Startup Battlefield, the startup accelerator competition, is returning to Sydney on August 19 in partnership with Stripe. The event brings competitive startup pitching to Australia's technology ecosystem.
content: On August 19, Startup Battlefield is returning to Sydney in partnership with Stripe, one of the world's most iconic technology companies. We're taking over Stripe Tour Sydney for a night that the Australian startup ecosystem won't forget.

zh.title: 创业战场回归澳大利亚——我们上次来悉尼时发生了什么
zh.summary: 初创企业大赛Startup Battlefield将于8月19日与Stripe合作回归悉尼。该活动为澳大利亚科技生态系统带来了具有竞争力的初创企业融资活动。

title: These LLMs are the best at resisting Russian propaganda
summary: An Estonian government benchmark evaluated dozens of large language models' ability to resist Russian propaganda and strategic narratives. The study provides comparative performance data on how AI systems handle disinformation campaigns.
content: Estonian government benchmark shows how dozens of models combat Russia's "strategic narratives."

zh.title: 这些大型语言模型最擅长抵抗俄罗斯宣传
zh.summary: 爱沙尼亚政府基准测试评估了数十个大型语言模型抵抗俄罗斯宣传和战略叙述的能力。该研究提供了人工智能系统如何处理虚假信息活动的比较性能数据。

title: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they’re getting more personal
summary: DIY enthusiasts are building portable custom computers, known as cyberdecks, housed inside everyday objects like purses and jewelry boxes, gaining significant viral social media attention. The trend features Raspberry Pi boards integrated into art projects and personal items.
content:
DIYer and TikTok user Annike Tan, who goes by @ubeboobey, can carry her cyberdeck around without anyone noticing because it doesn't look like a computer at all. Tan, who has been featured in The Cut and Wired, went viral earlier this year with a mermaid-themed cyberdeck she made inside an old purse. She has since upgraded it and built an MP3 player and a solar-powered cyberdeck. 
Tan and countless other DIYers are attracting millions of views showing off the personal computers they've built inside purses, jewelry boxes, toys, and old tech, hiding Raspberry Pi boards inside art projects.

 
 @ubeboobey 
Replying to @D493 I wear it as a bag! # …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 网络甲板曾经看起来像小笔记本电脑，但现在它们变得更加个人化
zh.summary: DIY爱好者正在构建便携式定制计算机（称为网络甲板），它们被放在钱包和珠宝盒等日常物品中，获得了大量的病毒式社交媒体关注。这一趋势以集成到艺术项目和个人物品中的树莓派主板为特色。

title: Dashlane explains how attackers managed to download encrypted password vaults
summary: Dashlane revealed how attackers downloaded encrypted password vaults by conducting broad-scale attacks targeting large numbers of users to increase success probability. The attack highlights risks even encrypted credentials face at scale.
content: By targeting large numbers of users, attackers increased their chances of success.

zh.title: Dashlane解释了攻击者如何设法下载加密的密码库
zh.summary: Dashlane揭示了攻击者通过针对大量用户进行大规模攻击来下载加密密码库的方式，以增加成功概率。该攻击突出了即使加密凭证在规模上也面临的风险。

title: Elon Musk tries again to escape FTC audits of X data handling
summary: Elon Musk is seeking to avoid FTC audits of X's data handling practices, with public commenters arguing that he cannot be trusted to protect user privacy. The case centers on regulatory oversight of the social platform's data protection measures.
content: Musk can't be trusted to protect X user privacy, public commenters warn FTC.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克再次试图逃避FTC对X数据处理的审计
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克试图避免FTC对X数据处理实践的审计，公众评论者辩称他不能被信任来保护用户隐私。该案件围绕对社交平台数据保护措施的监管监督展开。

title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
summary: Meta is constructing data centers inside tents as a novel cost-reduction approach amid heavy infrastructure investments. The unconventional solution reflects efforts to manage expenses related to AI infrastructure deployment.
content: Meta may have found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

zh.title: Meta学习特斯拉的策略，在帐篷中建造数据中心
zh.summary: Meta正在帐篷内构建数据中心，作为一种新颖的成本削减方法，同时进行大量基础设施投资。这个非常规解决方案反映了管理与人工智能基础设施部署相关费用的努力。

title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
summary: Poke, an AI agent platform that operates through text messaging, became the first AI agent approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. The approval enables business users to interact with AI capabilities directly through Apple's messaging service.
content: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

zh.title: 苹果批准Poke作为其商业消息平台上的第一个AI代理
zh.summary: Poke是一个通过短信运营的AI代理平台，成为苹果商业消息平台上首个获批的AI代理。该批准使商业用户能够直接通过苹果的消息服务与AI功能进行交互。

title: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to reduce his Project Stratos data center in Utah from 40,000 acres to approximately 20,570 acres following pressure from residents and state officials demanding a 75% reduction. The downsizing addresses community concerns about environmental impact, particularly water consumption, marking a significant compromise from the original proposal.
content:
Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve the size of his planned 40,000-acre data center in Utah amid mounting pressure from residents and activists, as reported earlier by local affiliate ABC4. The Shark Tank star sent a letter to Utah Senate President J. Stuart Adams on Thursday, saying that he will remove 19,430 acres from the project, located in and around the Locomotive Springs Waterfowl Management Area.
The change comes just days after Adams called on O'Leary to slash the size of his Project Stratos data center by 75 percent, which would reduce it to about 10,000 acres. Adams also asked O'Leary to implement technology that minimizes water consum …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 凯文·奥利里同意缩减犹他州大型数据中心规模
zh.summary: 凯文·奥利里在居民和州官员的压力下同意将其Project Stratos数据中心从40,000英亩缩减至约20,570英亩。此次缩减解决了社区对环保影响的担忧，特别是水资源消耗问题，标志着对原始提议的重大妥协。

title: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google now allows creators with at least 100,000 YouTube subscribers or equivalent social media presence to build dedicated Search profiles showcasing content, videos, and links. The feature, restricted to high-follower-count creators aged 18+, personalizes search results to highlight creators' work across multiple platforms.
content:
Google now lets big creators and publishers in the US claim dedicated profiles in Search to highlight things like videos, articles, and their other profiles online. But this feature won't be available to most people or organizations; Google is limiting it to people with at least 100,000 YouTube subscribers, 100,000 followers on Instagram or X, or 300,000 followers on TikTok. You'll need to meet the minimum on one of those platforms and be at least 18 years old to make a Search profile.
In demo videos, Google shows how a Search profile can feature links to websites and other platforms, a short summary of the person or brand, pinned media fro …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌让社交媒体明星自定义搜索结果页面
zh.summary: 谷歌现在允许拥有至少100,000名YouTube订阅者或等同社交媒体粉丝的创作者创建专门的搜索档案，展示内容、视频和链接。该功能仅限于拥有大量粉丝的18岁及以上创作者，可个性化搜索结果以突出创作者在多个平台的作品。

title: Amazon’s new plan for games: James Bond and AI Snoop Dogg
summary: Amazon is pivoting its gaming strategy toward mobile-playable party games, including an AI-powered title with Snoop Dogg as a judge, after abandoning heavy MMO investments. The shift reflects Amazon's renewed focus on accessible, casual gaming despite years of live-service infrastructure development.
content:
Amazon's gaming strategy has never really been clear. It's been very active in the space: acquiring Twitch, launching its Luna cloud gaming service nearly six years ago, investing heavily in MMOs during the peak of live-service wave, and having access to a huge slate of franchises through Prime Video and the MGM Studios library. Late last year, the company announced a major pivot, relaunching Luna with a focus on party games you can play with just your phone as a controller - including an AI-powered game starring Snoop Dogg as a judge - and basically jumping ship on MMOs.
At the time, it looked like a retreat, but Amazon says that isn't the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊的新游戏计划：詹姆斯·邦德和AI史努比·道格
zh.summary: 亚马逊在放弃大规模MMO投资后，正在将游戏战略转向移动派对游戏，包括一款以AI史努比·道格为评委的游戏。这一转变反映了亚马逊经过多年实时服务基础设施开发后，对易于使用的休闲游戏的重新关注。

title: Meta’s Oversight Board says account bans lack due process, transparency
summary: Meta's Oversight Board has raised concerns that account bans lack due process and transparency, demanding clearer information about violations and how AI influences moderation decisions. The criticism highlights accountability gaps in Meta's system for account removal justifications.
content: Meta's board cites "due process" concerns over account bans. It's also pushing Meta to offer clear information about violations and its use in AI in making its determinations.

zh.title: Meta的监督委员会称账户禁用缺乏正当程序和透明度
zh.summary: Meta的监督委员会提出了关于账户禁用缺乏正当程序和透明度的担忧,要求对违规信息和AI如何影响审核决定获得更清晰的说明。这一批评突出了Meta在账户删除理由方面系统中的问责差距。

title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
summary: Meta launched an AI assistant on Facebook that helps creators analyze performance by answering questions like "When should I post?" and summarizing audience feedback. The tool simplifies creator analytics by providing conversational insights instead of requiring manual dashboard navigation.
content: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

zh.title: Meta在Facebook推出新的AI创作者助手
zh.summary: Meta在Facebook推出了一款AI助手,帮助创作者通过回答"何时发布?"之类的问题和总结受众反馈来分析表现。该工具通过提供对话式见解而不是需要手动导航仪表板来简化创作者分析。

title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
summary: Apple's WWDC 2026 is expected to feature a major Siri overhaul and significant updates to Apple Intelligence capabilities. The event will showcase the latest in AI integration and voice assistant technology across Apple's ecosystem.
content: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

zh.title: WWDC 2026期待什么:Siri的备受期待的改革和Apple Intelligence更新
zh.summary: Apple的WWDC 2026预计将推出重大的Siri改革和Apple Intelligence能力的重要更新。该活动将展示Apple生态系统中最新的AI集成和语音助手技术。

title: After 11 years at Mars, NASA's MAVEN spacecraft went out with a whisper
summary: NASA's MAVEN spacecraft concluded its 11-year mission on Mars, with the team marking the end of the mission as a significant loss. The long-running rover provided crucial atmospheric data about the Red Planet before concluding operations.
content: “I think the team has really experienced the loss of a loved one with the end of the mission.”

zh.title: 在火星度过11年后，NASA的MAVEN航天器悄然谢幕
zh.summary: NASA的MAVEN航天器在火星完成了为期11年的任务，团队将此标记为重大损失。这个长期运行的探测器在任务结束前提供了关于红色星球的关键大气数据。

title: A burglar used a Waymo to steal yoga clothes in San Francisco — and got away with it
summary: A burglar in San Francisco reportedly used a Waymo robotaxi to steal yoga clothes and evade capture, raising questions about how Waymo manages and stores footage from its autonomous vehicles. The incident highlights potential security gaps in Waymo's data handling and access controls.
content: The incident helps shed some new light on how Waymo treats and stores the footage captured by its robotaxis.

zh.title: 一名窃贼在旧金山用Waymo机器人出租车偷走瑜伽服装——并逃脱了
zh.summary: 一名旧金山窃贼据报使用Waymo机器人出租车盗窃瑜伽服装并成功逃脱，引发了对Waymo如何管理和存储自主车辆录像的质疑。该事件暴露了Waymo数据处理和访问控制中的潜在安全漏洞。

title: Cash App launches a wand for tap-and-pay
summary: Cash App has launched additional tap-to-pay tags as part of its expanding payment accessory lineup. The new offerings build on the company's strategy to make contactless payments more accessible and convenient for users.
content: Cash App plans to launch more tap-to-pay tags.

zh.title: Cash App推出点击支付配件
zh.summary: Cash App推出了额外的点击支付标签，作为其扩展支付配件产品线的一部分。这些新产品基于该公司让非接触式支付对用户更便利和方便的战略。

title: Belkin’s new Joy-Con grips also boost the Switch 2’s battery life
summary: Belkin released a Charging Grip for Nintendo Switch 2 featuring a 10,000mAh battery that extends gameplay by 3-4 hours while improving controller ergonomics with better grips. Available in multiple colors for $99.99, the accessory directly addresses the Switch 2's battery limitations.
content:
Most of Belkin's Switch 2 accessories are designed to either protect or power up Nintendo's latest handheld, like its Charging Case Pro that actually does both at the same time. Its new multitasking Charging Grip can also add three or four more hours of playtime through an included 10,000mAh battery pack, while improving the Switch 2's ergonomics with beefier nonslip grips for the Joy-Con controllers.
Belkin's Charging Grip is now available through the company's online store in black, lilac, and olive green color options for $99.99. The magnetic 10,000mAh battery sticks to the back of the Switch 2, but since the handheld doesn't support mag …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 贝尔金新推出的Joy-Con握柄也能增强Switch 2的电池续航
zh.summary: 贝尔金为Nintendo Switch 2推出了充电握柄，配备10,000mAh电池，可将游戏时间延长3-4小时，同时通过更好的握柄改进控制器人体工程学。该配件提供多种颜色选择，价格为$99.99，直接解决了Switch 2的电池续航限制。

title: Cash App made a magic wand for contactless payments
summary: Cash App launched the Cash App Wand, an NFC-enabled, star-topped wand that enables contactless payments without requiring a phone or card. The novelty design capitalizes on a viral DIY trend of creative payment card holders, particularly magic wands that increase reach for drive-thru transactions.
content:
The Cash App Wand is a novel way to pay for your next coffee. | Image: Cash App	

The convenience of contactless payments can already feel magical, but Cash App is really leaning into that with its latest accessory. The mobile payment service is launching the Cash App Wand: an NFC-enabled, iridescent, star-topped wand that allows users to make on-the-go payments without pulling out their phone or card.
This plays on a popular DIY trend that's already circulating on social media platforms, in which people are 3D printing (or otherwise constructing) their own creative "cases" for contactless payment cards. Magic wands seem to be the most popular design, likely because the extra reach makes them convenient for drive-thru pa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Cash App推出了一根魔法棒用于无接触支付
zh.summary: Cash App推出了Cash App Wand，这是一根配有NFC功能、星形顶部的魔法棒，可在不需要手机或卡的情况下实现无接触支付。这种新颖的设计充分利用了创意支付卡持有者的病毒式DIY趋势，尤其是那些可增加得来速交易距离的魔法棒。

title: Windows is back on the Microsoft menu
summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella prominently featured Windows and the new Surface RTX Spark Dev Kit at Build 2026, signaling renewed focus on Windows innovation. The announcement, paired with Nvidia's RTX Spark chips for local AI workloads, marks a potential shift in Windows development priorities.
content:
I can't remember the last time Microsoft kicked off a Build keynote with Windows front and center, but that's exactly what CEO Satya Nadella did this week. Nadella didn't address the issues Microsoft is trying to fix in Windows 11 but chose to woo the audience with Microsoft's slick Surface RTX Spark Dev Kit instead, calling it a "dream machine."
Nadella unveiled the new Surface hardware just days after Nvidia officially returned to Windows on Arm with its new RTX Spark chips. Both companies are talking up these chips as some kind of new beginning for PCs, and it's clear that RTX Spark will drive local AI workloads in a way that Microsoft's …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Windows重新出现在微软的菜单上
zh.summary: 微软CEO萨蒂亚·纳德拉在Build 2026大会上重点展示了Windows和新的Surface RTX Spark开发工具包，表明对Windows创新的重新关注。这项公告与英伟达为本地AI工作负载推出的RTX Spark芯片相结合，标志着Windows开发优先级可能的转变。

title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage
summary: Waymo partnered with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose depleted battery packs from its robotaxis as energy grid storage systems. The deal demonstrates sustainable EV fleet management by extending battery lifecycles beyond vehicle use.
content: The company announced a deal with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose the battery packs as Waymo pulls them off the road.

zh.title: Waymo的报废机器人出租车电池将用于电网存储
zh.summary: Waymo与B2U Storage Solutions合作，将其自动驾驶出租车的废旧电池组改造成能源电网储存系统。该交易通过延长电池在车辆使用之外的生命周期，展示了可持续的电动车队管理方案。

title: Remarkable’s refurbished Paper Pro bundle is hundreds off
summary: Woot is offering a refurbished Remarkable Paper Pro bundle with the 11.8-inch color E Ink tablet plus $139 in accessories for $509, significantly below regular pricing and cheaper than Remarkable's own refurbished options. The deal makes color E Ink technology more accessible to budget-conscious note-takers.
content:
Color E Ink tablets aren’t usually affordable. I’m not going to say that Woot’s price on a refurbished “good as new” Remarkable Paper Pro is cheap, but it’s pretty fantastic compared to buying one new. Normally $629 just for the tablet, you can get a bundle that includes the big 11.8-inch Paper Pro plus $139 worth of brand new accessories (a Mosaic Weave Book Folio and a Marker Plus) for $509 if you buy it used. The bundle comes with a 90-day warranty, which pales in comparison so Remarkable’s own one-year warranty on refurbished devices. Then again, the same refurbished bundle on the company’s site is $649.
Remarkable Paper Pro bundle (refurbished)
Includes Mosaic Weave Book Folio Cover and Market Plus with eraser.

Where to Buy:

 $818 $509 at Woot

It’s nice to have a color E Ink so close in price to Remarkable’s newer Paper Pure, a 10.3-inch black and white E Ink tablet for note-taking. While many of their features overlap, you may prefer not just the color capabilities of the Paper Pro, but also its front light. The Paper Pure doesn’t have a light at all. One thing to keep in mind about the Pro’s color-capable screen is that it uses Gallery display tech, which has a slow refresh rate because it renders colors instead of using filters like Kaleido displays.

zh.title: Remarkable翻新版Paper Pro套装优惠数百美元
zh.summary: Woot正在销售翻新的Remarkable Paper Pro套装，包含11.8英寸彩色电子墨水平板电脑和价值139美元的配件，售价仅为509美元，远低于常规价格，也便宜于Remarkable自身的翻新产品。该优惠使彩色电子墨水技术对预算有限的笔记爱好者更易获得。

title: It doesn't feel very agricultural: The 2026 Subaru Solterra review
summary: Subaru continues selling its Solterra badge-engineered SUV alongside the new Trailseeker EV, providing multiple electric vehicle options in its SUV lineup. The review examines the Solterra's positioning in Subaru's expanding electric vehicle portfolio.
content: Subaru's badge-engineered SUV remains on sale alongside the new Trailseeker.

zh.title: 感觉不太农业化：2026款斯巴鲁Solterra评测
zh.summary: 斯巴鲁继续销售其Solterra贴牌SUV，同时推出新的Trailseeker电动车，在其SUV产品线中提供多个电动车选项。该评测审视了Solterra在斯巴鲁不断扩大的电动车产品组合中的定位。

title: Let us filter AI slop, you cowards
summary: Platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok have begun labeling AI-generated content, but users still lack the ability to filter it out. The article argues that while content authentication is improving, meaningful filtering tools are needed to protect users from unwanted AI-generated material online.
content:
Nobody should be subjected to seeing shrimp Jesus all over their social feeds. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

It's almost impossible to avoid seeing AI-generated content online, but it doesn't have to be this way. YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more have ramped up content authentication efforts over the last year, with many now automatically applying labels to distinguish AI-generated images, videos, and music from those made by real, human creators.
That's all very well and good if we're just stumbling across labeled content at random, but you know what would be better? Letting us filter out the AI slop.
Current labeling efforts haven't meaningfully changed how content is presented online. You may notice that some TikTok or YouTube videos in you …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 让我们过滤AI垃圾内容，你们这些胆小鬼
zh.summary: YouTube、Instagram和TikTok等平台已开始标记AI生成的内容，但用户仍缺乏过滤这些内容的能力。这篇文章辩称，虽然内容身份验证正在改进，但需要有意义的过滤工具来保护用户免受不需要的AI生成内容侵害。

title: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
summary: Major AI companies including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Microsoft are calling on Congress to regulate synthetic DNA and RNA sales to prevent misuse for bioweapon development. The open letter warns of a biosecurity gap that could pose pandemic risks without stronger screening requirements for genetic material purchases.
content:
Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons. In an open letter to US lawmakers, tech leaders are pressing Congress to enact rules closing what they say is an alarming biosecurity gap that could help trigger a global pandemic.
Anthropic's Dario Amodei, OpenAI's Sam Altman, and Microsoft's Mustafa Suleyman are among the signatories urging US lawmakers to require companies selling synthetic DNA and RNA - genetic material that can ordered online and assembled in a lab - to screen purchases for sequences t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI领导者呼吁采取更强有力的措施防范AI辅助生物武器
zh.summary: 包括Anthropic、OpenAI和微软在内的主要AI公司正在呼吁国会对合成DNA和RNA销售进行监管，以防止其被滥用于生物武器开发。这份公开信警告了一个生物安全漏洞，如果没有对遗传物质购买的更强筛查要求，这个漏洞可能会带来大流行风险。

title: Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better
summary: Oura's new Ring 5 is 40% smaller and lighter than its predecessor, positioned as the world's smallest smart ring and priced starting at $399. The device maintains the brand's core health-tracking features while improving portability and wearability.
content: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.

zh.title: Oura Ring 5评测：更薄、更轻、更优秀
zh.summary: Oura的新款Ring 5比其前身小40%、更轻便，定位为世界上最小的智能戒指，起价399美元。该设备保持了该品牌的核心健康追踪功能，同时提高了便携性和可穿戴性。

title: Yes, the Oura Ring 5 is noticeably smaller
summary: The new Oura Ring 5 is noticeably smaller and lighter than both the Ring 4 and earlier Gen 3 models, as confirmed through direct size comparisons. The article serves as a preview ahead of a full review, addressing a frequently asked question from Oura Ring users considering upgrades.
content:
From top to bottom: Oura Ring 5, Oura Ring 4 in ceramic, Oura Ring 4 regular, and Oura Ring Gen 3.	

This is not an Oura Ring 5 review. That's coming later, once I've had enough time to really test the new durability and battery life claims, plus the new software updates that start rolling out today. In the meantime, I did want to provide an answer to a burning question that I've seen asked in many Oura Ring comment sections across the internet.
Yes, it is smaller and lighter than the Oura Ring 4. And for impatient folks considering upgrades, I come bearing photographic size comparisons to the Oura Ring 4 - regular and ceramic versions - plus the Oura Ring Gen 3.
A note: Sizing matters a lot with smart rings. Not only do smart ring makers …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 是的，Oura Ring 5 明显更小
zh.summary: 新的 Oura Ring 5 比 Ring 4 和早期的第 3 代型号明显更小且更轻，这已通过直接尺寸比较得到确认。该文章作为完整评测的预览，解答了正在考虑升级的 Oura Ring 用户的常见问题。

title: This Google Photos update has saved your digital photo frame
summary: Aura digital photo frames will continue to automatically sync with Google Photos following API changes, thanks to Oura's migration to Google's new Ambient API. Users can now automatically update their frames with photos from Google Photos albums without manual intervention.
content:
Now you don’t have to manually add new photos of loved ones to your grandma’s Aura frame. | Image: Aura	

Aura's digital photo frames will continue to automatically sync with your Google Photos albums, after API changes threatened to remove the feature. Aura is now rolling out a full migration to Google's new Ambient API, allowing your Aura frame slideshows to be automatically updated with new photos, instead of requiring owners to manually add them via the Google Photos app.
"With our updated Google Photos integration, you can add photos directly from the Google Photos app or sync an entire Google Photos album to keep Aura frames updated automatically," Aura said in its announcement. "Photos are sent directly to your Aura frames from Google Ph …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这个 Google Photos 更新拯救了你的数字相框
zh.summary: 由于 Oura 迁移到 Google 的新 Ambient API，Aura 数字相框将在 API 更改后继续与 Google Photos 自动同步。用户现在可以自动更新其相框中来自 Google Photos 相册的照片，无需手动干预。

title: Used Waymo robotaxi batteries become backup storage for power grids
summary: Used Waymo autonomous vehicle batteries are being repurposed as backup energy storage for power grids in California and Texas. The initiative demonstrates how EV battery recycling can support grid stability while maximizing the second-life value of used batteries.
content: Used Waymo batteries will bolster California and Texas energy storage projects.

zh.title: 用过的 Waymo 自动驾驶出租车电池成为电网备用存储
zh.summary: 已使用的 Waymo 自动驾驶车辆电池正在被重新利用，作为加州和德州电网的备用能源存储。该倡议展示了电动汽车电池回收如何支持电网稳定性，同时最大化了用过电池的二次利用价值。

title: Amazon develops a warehouse robot that workers can speak to
summary: Amazon has upgraded its Proteus warehouse robot with AI capabilities to accept natural language commands from workers instead of requiring specialized software. The update reflects Amazon's broader shift toward autonomous warehouse systems while making the robots more accessible to human employees.
content:
The design hasn’t changed much from the original Proteus, which was announced in 2022. | Image: Amazon	

Amazon has announced a new version of its fully autonomous warehouse robot, Proteus, that will interact using language instead of code. The expanded capabilities come as part of a growing pivot toward automation as the e-commerce giant replaces its human workers with robots. 
Amazon says the AI-powered upgrade means its human employees can assign the robot tasks in the same way they'd communicate with colleagues. Previously, workers would need to use specialized software to direct the floor-level, tortoise-like systems, which are designed for heavy lifting and moving large carts throughout Amazon's warehouses. "You tell it what needs to be  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊开发可与工人语音交互的仓库机器人
zh.summary: 亚马逊为其Proteus仓库机器人增加了人工智能功能,使其能够接受员工的自然语言命令,而无需专门的软件。这一更新反映了亚马逊向自主仓库系统转变的更广泛趋势,同时使机器人对人类员工更易于使用。

title: Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design
summary: Shokz has announced two new open earbud models—the OpenDots 2 and OpenDots Air—featuring improved sound and lighter design compared to traditional earbuds. The OpenDots Air serves as an affordable entry-level option at $129.95, over $70 less expensive than the original model. Both designs position drivers to project sound toward the ear canal without blocking it, offering enhanced comfort and environmental awareness.
content:
The OpenDots 2 are designed to be more comfortable than traditional wireless earbuds that sit inside the ear. | Image: Shokz	

Shokz has announced two new versions of its open earbuds. Like the original OpenDots One that launched in May 2025, the new Shokz OpenDots 2 and OpenDots Air are both designed to be worn clipped to the back of your ear with their drivers positioned to project sound toward your ear canals without blocking them. It's a design that potentially offers more comfort and environmental awareness than traditional wireless earbuds, while the two new versions cater to specific needs.
The OpenDots Air are an entry-level version available in black or daybreak purple color options for $129.95 which is over $70 cheaper than the original. They feature Shok …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Shokz升级开放式耳塞，音质更好设计更轻
zh.summary: Shokz推出了两款新的开放式耳塞型号——OpenDots 2和OpenDots Air，相比传统耳塞具有更好的音质和更轻的设计。OpenDots Air作为平价入门级选项，售价为129.95美元，比原型号便宜70多美元。两种设计都将驱动单元定位为向耳道投射声音而不阻挡它，提供增强的舒适度和环境意识。

title: Benchmark raises its first-ever growth fund as part of $2B capital raise
summary: Benchmark, the legendary venture capital firm, is raising its first-ever growth fund as part of a $2 billion capital raise. This marks a significant departure from its 20+ year tradition of maintaining funds at approximately $425 million. The expansion reflects the firm's evolution to meet the needs of larger-scale tech companies.
content: The legendary abandons its more than 20 year tradition of keeping its funds to about $425 million.

zh.title: Benchmark在20亿美元融资中推出首个成长基金
zh.summary: 传奇风险投资公司Benchmark正在推出其首个成长基金，作为20亿美元融资的一部分。这标志着该公司在维持约4.25亿美元基金20多年的传统之后的重大转变。这一扩张反映了该公司的发展，以满足大规模科技公司的需求。

title: Quick commerce FirstClub doubles valuation to $255M in nine months
summary: FirstClub, a Bengaluru quick commerce startup, has doubled its valuation to $255 million while crossing 1 million orders and achieving $50 million annualized GMV in nine months. The rapid growth demonstrates strong market demand in India's competitive quick commerce sector.
content: The Bengaluru startup has crossed 1 million orders and reached a $50 million annualized GMV run rate within a year of launch.

zh.title: 快速商务初创公司FirstClub在九个月内估值翻倍至2.55亿美元
zh.summary: Bengaluru快速商务初创公司FirstClub在九个月内将估值翻倍至2.55亿美元，同时超过100万订单，年化GMV达到5000万美元。快速增长展示了印度竞争激烈的快速商务市场中强劲的市场需求。

title: Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
summary: Nintendo will offer Switch 2 versions in the EU with user-replaceable batteries to comply with new EU regulations taking effect February 18, 2027, which mandate replaceable batteries in portable game consoles. This regulatory shift marks a return of consumer-friendly repairability features in electronics.
content:
Nintendo is planning to launch versions of Switch 2 hardware in the EU that will let users easily replace the battery. To meet its obligations from a new EU regulation that's set to go into effect on February 18th, 2027, Nintendo says on its website that it is "implementing measures to comply with these requirements by preparing versions of products to meet the Regulation."
Thanks to EU regulations, gadgets with user-replaceable batteries are making a comeback, as my colleague Dominic Preston wrote recently. Starting on that February 2027 date, EU rules mandate that many types of gadgets, including portable game consoles, must allow users t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 任天堂证实将在欧盟销售配备可更换电池的Switch 2
zh.summary: 任天堂将在欧盟提供配备用户可更换电池的Switch 2版本，以符合将于2027年2月18日生效的新欧盟法规，该法规要求便携式游戏机配备可更换电池。这一监管转变标志着消费者友好的电子设备可修复特性的回归。
